title.en: United, free and brilliant - can anyone stop France masterclass?

summary.zh-CN: 法国主教练迪迪埃·德尚（ Didier Deschamps ）敦促谨慎行事，尽管他看着自己的球队拆除瑞典队，让蓝军球迷梦想着赢得世界杯。

title.en: England right-backs Quansah and James out of DR Congo game

title.en: France breeze past Sweden as Mbappe matches Messi

summary.en: Kylian Mbappe helped book France's place in the World Cup round of 16 by taking his tournament total to six goals in a slick 3-0 victory over Sweden.
summary.zh-CN: 基利安·姆巴佩（ Kylian Mbappe ）以3比0击败瑞典队，将比赛总进6球，帮助法国队在世界杯16强赛中排名第一。

title.en: Neville: France ‘a level above’ and Mbappe ‘on verge of greatness’

summary.zh-CN: 加里·内维尔（ Gary Neville ）表示，法国队在32轮比赛中以3-0战胜瑞典队后，在世界杯上“高于”任何其他球队。

title.en: Tuchel: We're prepared for difficult DR Congo clash despite right-back woes

summary.en: England manager Thomas Tuchel has said his side are prepared for DR Congo "to make their lives difficult" in Wednesday's World Cup last-32 clash in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）表示，他的球队已准备好在周三在亚特兰大举行的世界杯最后32场比赛中“让刚果民主共和国的生活变得困难”。

title.en: Mbappe scores twice as France dominate Sweden

summary.en: Kylian Mbappe becomes the all-time leading goalscorer in World Cup knockout matches with after scoring twice as France crusie past Sweden 3-0 to set up a last-16 tie with Paraguay.
summary.zh-CN: 基利安·姆巴佩（ Kylian Mbappe ）在世界杯淘汰赛中成为历史领先的射手，他在法国队以3比0击败瑞典队，与巴拉圭队并列16强。

title.en: Bigger than Rumble in the Jungle? DR Congo bid for World Cup history
title.zh-CN: 比丛林中的隆隆声还要大？刚果民主共和国申办世界杯历史

summary.en: DR Congo's run at the 2026 World Cup comes 52 years on from both their disastrous debut at the finals and one of sport's greatest occasions held in Kinshasa.
summary.zh-CN: 刚果民主共和国参加2026年世界杯，距离他们在决赛中灾难性的首次亮相和在金沙萨举行的体育盛会之一已经过去了52年。
